title: cynodon dactylon subsp. nipponicus
intro: Cynodon dactylon subsp. nipponicus, also known as Japanese dandelion or Japanese Bermuda grass, is a subspecies of the Cynodon dactylon species, which is a type of grass native to various parts of the world. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cynodon dactylon subsp. nipponicus include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce cholesterol and blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine in various parts of Asia.
